overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring massive neon-lit skyscrapers shrouded in thick fog. The camera glides smoothly between towering megastructures with glowing cyan and orange lights, capturing flying vehicles in the distance. This is game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting Night City.

events.description: flying vehicle enters frame from upper right, moving slowly across the skyline
flying vehicle exits frame to the right, disappearing into the fog

agents.ego_description: piloting drone slowly through the canyon of skyscrapers, maintaining steady altitude while drifting leftward

notable_agents.action: aerial vehicle with red navigation lights flying horizontally from right to left in the distance

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with vertical white light strips and illuminated windows
massive dark geometric skyscraper with minimal lighting occupying the right foreground
large building with distinctive grid pattern of cyan neon windows
multi-level curved highway structure with streaming red and white light trails from traffic below
small dark aerial vehicle silhouetted against the fog with red lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping aerial view of a fog-shrouded cyberpunk city at night. The camera drifts slowly between massive structures, dominated by a cylindrical central tower and a dark brutalist building on the right. A flying vehicle crosses the upper portion of the frame before disappearing, while below, curved elevated highways create ribbons of light through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between major downtown towers

events.description: camera begins more pronounced leftward pan, shifting perspective from central tower to left building complex

agents.ego_description: continuing slow leftward drift, revealing more of the grid-patterned building while the central tower recedes to the right

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its leftward drift, the cylindrical central tower moves toward the right edge of the frame while the grid-patterned neon building becomes more prominent in the center. The elevated highway remains visible below with its constant stream of lights, and distant towers begin to emerge through the fog in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep city vista with multiple tower layers

events.description: camera clears the dark brutalist tower, revealing expansive view of deeper downtown with multiple distant skyscrapers
second flying vehicle appears briefly in the far distance on the right

agents.ego_description: gliding past the massive left building complex, now revealing the open cityscape beyond with layered towers fading into the fog

notable_agents.action: distant aerial vehicle hovering or moving slowly near the horizon

entered.detail: group of faintly illuminated skyscrapers visible through the thick fog in the deep background
tall thin towers with vertical cyan lighting strips on the far left horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a sweeping vista of the deep city as the camera moves past the dominant right-side structures. The grid neon building now occupies the center-right while the view opens up to show multiple layers of distant towers fading into the cyan fog. The elevated highway curves through the lower frame with increased clarity, and additional flying vehicles can be seen navigating the distant airspace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift through a fog-shrouded cyberpunk metropolis that gradually opens from a narrow urban canyon into a sweeping city vista. It begins by gliding between massive structures, where a cylindrical central tower and a dark brutalist building frame a view of curved elevated highways and a lone flying vehicle crossing above. As the camera drifts leftward, the central tower recedes toward the edge of the frame, allowing a grid-patterned neon building to emerge as the focal point while distant towers begin to pierce through the haze. The scene then expands as the camera moves past these dominant structures, revealing multiple layers of skyscrapers fading into a deep cyan fog. Finally, the view opens fully to show the intricate network of the elevated highway curving below and additional flying vehicles navigating the vast, illuminated airspace.
